name: Chicken Amore
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breast halves (boneless, skinless, 4 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken with pepper.
2. Dredge chicken in 3 tablespoons of flour.
3. Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet.
4. Brown chicken on both sides.
5. Add garlic and remove from heat.
6. Reserve 2 tablespoons broth.
7. Add the remainder of broth, wine, thyme, red-pepper seasoning, olives, and mushrooms to the skillet.
8. Simmer, covered, for 10 minutes until cooked.
9. Whisk together remaining 2 tablespoons broth and 1 tablespoon flour in a small bowl.
10. Stir into skillet.
11. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly, about 2-3 minutes.
12. Sprinkle with parsley.
13. Serve with rice.
